---
title: "TRACE"
output: html_notebook
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{TRACE}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---



```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```


### 1. DATA process
1.1 library pacakge

```{r setup}
library(MSdev)
```
